description: Style Note This fabulous pair of denims from denizen adds an edgy style to your look, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressed up look. Product Details Dark blue slightly washed jeans, has a buttoned and zipped closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch at the back on the waist, two insert pockets in front with a patch pocket inside the right insert pocket and two patch pockets at the back with embroidered brand logo on the right patch pocket Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Do not bleach or dry clean Use hot iron Size and Fit Regular Straight fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
